title: Short title
doc_html:
PART IV.  LICENSING OF AMBULATORY SURGICAL CENTERS

§2131.  Short title

This Part may be cited as the Ambulatory Surgical Centers Licensing Law.

Added by Acts 1976, No. 596, §1.
